Introduction
    Following the manga source material high school girl Ooshima Shino has a speech impediment and, as such, enjoys a lack of friends and general awkwardness. Shino soon meets Kayo who is tone-deaf despite her love of music and song. ...

Also known as: 志乃ちゃんは自分の名前が言えない
